allow: PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c cd /d d:\\ESSI\\server && python run.py 2>&1 > d:\\ESSI\\server\\server.log" -WindowStyle Hidden)

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('weekday:', len\(d.get\('weekday',[]\)\), 'items'\); print\('market_types:', len\(d.get\('market_types',[]\)\), 'items'\); print\('Sample weekday:', d['weekday'][:2]\); print\('Sample market:', d['market_types'][:3]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('deliveries:', len\(d\), 'items'\); [print\(x['delivery_man_name'][:20], x['order_count'], x['total_weight']\) for x in d[:3]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); paths=[p for p in d['paths'] if 'extended' in p or 'charts' in p]; print\('\\n'.join\(paths\)\)")
